label: Configure starting pawns (kind defs)
description: Configuration page for selecting starting pawns with specific pawn kind counts. Requires the Biotech DLC.

kindCounts.label: Kind counts
kindCounts.description: List of pawn kind and count pairs defining the mix of starting pawns.

leftBehindPawnKind.label: Left behind pawn kind
leftBehindPawnKind.description: PawnKindDef used for any pawns that are left behind when the scenario starts (Biotech Mechanitor scenario).
